details.test: Task 1: Book closest 4.5+ star standard oil change under $70 next Saturday morning
Task 2: Apply 15%+ brake coupon to service and go to checkout summary
Task 3: Select 2018 Honda Civic maintenance plan with longest warranty under $50/month
Task 4: Request engine diagnostics quote with earliest morning drop-off within 3 days
Task 5: Book cheapest same-day flat tire repair with evening slot
Task 6: Schedule service with free shuttle and pickup address
Task 7: Purchase $100 email gift card and go to checkout summary
Task 8: Set up 3-month maintenance reminders for 2020 Toyota Camry via email & SMS
